模型发布.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
模型发布.summary_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant增强ChatGPT健康回复的推理、语境与沟通清晰度。

产品.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
产品.summary_zh: OpenAI为ChatGPT企业版推出新用量分析及支出控制功能，助力成本管理。

研究.title: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems
研究.summary_zh: 提出用道义策略对智能体AI系统进行运行时治理。

研究.title: Measuring Curriculum Alignment across Topical Coverage, Competency, and Cognitive Depth: A Longitudinal Framework Applied to CS2013 and CS2023
研究.summary_zh: 提出跨主题覆盖、能力与认知深度衡量课程对齐的纵向框架。

研究.title: Diffusion Language Models: An Experimental Analysis
研究.summary_zh: 对扩散语言模型进行实验分析。

研究.title: Hidden Anchors in Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation
研究.summary_zh: 研究多智能体LLM商议中的隐藏锚定效应。

研究.title: DeXposure-Claw: An Agentic System for DeFi Risk Supervision
研究.summary_zh: DeXposure-Claw：针对DeFi风险的智能体监督系统。

研究.title: LLM Doesn't Know What It Doesn't Know: Detecting Epistemic Blind Spots via Cross-Model Attribution Divergence on Clinical Tabular Data
研究.summary_zh: 通过跨模型归因分歧检测LLM在临床表格数据上的认知盲区。

研究.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
研究.summary_zh: 研究人员用OpenAI推理模型辅助诊断儿童罕见遗传病，新确诊18例。

研究.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
研究.summary_zh: Google AMIE系统在复杂疾病管理上媲美初级保健医生，研究登《自然》。

观点.title: AI Engineer Claims to Have Cracked Linear A
观点.summary_zh: AI工程师声称破解了线性A文字。

观点.title: Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school
观点.summary_zh: 挪威对小学实施近乎全面的AI禁令。
